summary: Real CLI test: passes a verdict for FIX-001.1.1, runs review --audit, asserts audit file generated for the passing-verdict req only (unreviewed FIX-001.1.2 gets none), body carries construct-counterexample and pass-only-if-none directives, and the verdict file is byte-identical before/after. Minor untested near-miss: a failing (not merely absent) verdict is not exercised.
